Deel operates a comprehensive all-in-one platform for managing global HR and payroll across distributed international workforces.
Deel is a global HR platform that handles hiring, compliance, onboarding, invoicing, and payments without barriers.

payload.statement: Deel's platform offers HR workflow features including onboarding, offboarding, country-specific compliance notifications, new manager training resources, relocation compliance checks, end-of-probation

Deel markets an AI-driven assistant ('Deel AI') offering compliance insights, HR question answering, curated people-data insights, and 24/7 support, trained by HR/compliance experts across 150+ countr

Deel provides a white-label offering that allows partners to use Deel's global infrastructure and entities under their own brand, including branding controls, a setup wizard, and feature visibility co

Deel presents pricing with 'starting at' tiers (e.g., 'Starting at Enterprise') and describes flexible, usage-based pricing based on hiring needs, though specific tier names (EOR Standard, US PEO Empl
Deel publicly claims pricing transparency and flexible commercial terms, stating upfront pricing with no surprise fees and month-to-month terms with no long-term contract requirement.
Deel publicizes broad scale metrics: presence in 150+ countries, 40,000+ customers, and $20B+ in global payroll processed.
Deel offers integration and extensibility capabilities, including API access and connections to payroll, accounting, and expense-management tools, to support workflow automation.

Deel includes worker-facing self-service features (time-off submission, payslip access, information updates), the ability to manage candidates, interviews, and offers, and a modern platform design int

Deel's Employer of Record (EOR) service is marketed as an all-inclusive fee covering onboarding, local compliance, payroll processing, tax filings, benefits administration, and HR/legal support, conso
Deel highlights third-party validation and enterprise customer sentiment, including a G2 leader rating of 4.8/5 (14,210+ reviews) and a reported 90+ NPS among enterprise customers.
